description_long: This is a robust wooden chair with a dark brown finish, featuring a slatted backrest and a flat, plank-style seat. The chair is equipped with wide, sturdy armrests and four thick, square legs that provide stability. The backrest consists of five vertical slats framed by a slightly curved top rail, offering ergonomic support. The seat is composed of several horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and durable appearance. The armrests are broad and flat, suitable for resting arms or placing small items. The overall design suggests it is built for outdoor use, such as in parks or public spaces, with a focus on durability and comfort.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden chair with a slatted backrest, wide armrests, and a plank-style seat, designed for durability and comfort.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the slatted backrest and the solid, square legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open seat area, armrests, and the vertical slats of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest and seat construction.
